title: Defender (disambiguation)
content:
'''Defender''' could mean any of the following:
[[File:TIEdefender-CGSWG.png|thumb|300px|right|The TIE/d "Defender" Starfighter]]
==Canon==
*'''''[[Defender]]''''', a [[Venator-class Star Destroyer|''Venator''-class Star Destroyer]] that served in the [[Galactic Republic Navy|Republic Navy]] during the [[Clone Wars]]
*The '''[[TIE/d "Defender" Multi-Role Starfighter]]'''

==Legends==
===Starships===
*The [[Defender (ship-design program)|Defender]] program of ship design.
**The [[Defender-class assault carrier|''Defender''-class assault carrier]].
**The [[Defender starfighter|Defender]], a [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] produced by [[Republic Engineering Corporation]] during from the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].
**The [[Nebula-class Star Destroyer|''Nebula''-class Star Destroyer]], also known as the ''Defender''-class Star Destroyer.
*The [[Star Defender]], a warship classification introduced by the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]].
**The [[Strident-class Star Defender|''Strident''-class Star Defender]].
**The [[Viscount-class Star Defender|''Viscount''-class Star Defender]].
*[[Defender (Bakura-class)|''Defender'']], a [[Bakura-class destroyer|''Bakura''-class destroyer]].
*[[Defender/Legends|''Defender'']], a [[Venator-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Venator''-class Star Destroyer]]
*''[[Fell Defender]]'', a [[Chiss/Legends|Chiss]] [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyer]].
*''[[Loyal Defender]]'', a [[Galactic Federation of Free Alliances]] warship.
*The [[Sabaoth Defender]], a [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] era [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]].
*The [[TIE/D Defender]], a [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] produced by [[Sienar Fleet Systems/Legends|Sienar Fleet Systems]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].
*The [[Defender-class light corvette/Legends|Defender-Class Light Corvette]], a [[Corellian/Legends|Corellian]] [[Corvette/Legends|corvette]] used by the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] during the [[Great Galactic War]].

===Military units===
*[[Defender Wing]], a New Republic [[Bomber/Legends|bomber]] wing.
*Fleet of the Glorious Defender Queen, a nickname for the [[Hapan Royal Navy]].

===Technology===
*The [[Defender sporting blaster pistol/Legends|Defender]], a model of [[Blaster/Legends|blaster]] manufactured by the [[Drearian Defense Conglomerate/Legends|Drearian Defense Conglomerate]].
*The [["Defender" deflector shield generator]] built by [[Chempat Engineered Defenses]].
**The [[Supreme Defender]], presumably related.
*The [[V-150 Planet Defender/Legends|v-150 Planet Defender]], a [[planetary ion cannon]] built by [[Kuat Drive Yards/Legends|Kuat Drive Yards]].
*[[Defender Droid]], [[Bodyguard/Legends|bodyguard]] [[Droid/Legends|droids]] by [[Tendrando Arms]].
*The [[Defender ion mine]] by [[Merr-Sonn Munitions, Inc./Legends|Merr-Sonn Munitions, Inc.]]
*The [[Defender (hilt)|Defender]] [[Lightsaber hilt/Legends|lightsaber hilt]] used in the [[New Jedi Order]].
*The [[12 Defender MicroBlaster]], a [[micro blaster]].
*[[Ithorian defender armor]]
*[[KGDefender ion engine]], an [[ion drive]] engine by [[KonGar Ship Works]].
*[[Zemphyr Defenders, Incorporated]], a manufacturer of anti-weapon devices.

===People===
*[[Defender of the Home Tree/Legends|Defender of the Home Tree]], an ancient [[Kashyyyk/Legends|Kashyyyk]] title.
*[[Defender of Kamparus]], a title held by [[Sharad Hett]].
*The [[Defender (role)|Defender]] was a traditional role in [[Guiteica/Legends|Guiteica]] challenge by combat.
*[[Ring Defender]], a [[Jensaarai/Legends|Jensaarai]] occupation.

===Other===
*[[Acicular defender]], a subspecies of [[Corellia/Legends|Corellian]] [[paralope]].
*Defender of the Core, a nickname for the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Anaxes/Legends|Anaxes]].

{{Disambig}}

|en=Защитник (значения)

|sv=Defender
}}
